svg.metadata: {"schema_version":1,"id":"18_two_loops","label":"Two sequential loops","topology":"Create two natural sequential split-and-rejoin choices: a broad left loop in the foreground followed by a smaller right loop in the middle distance.","sockets":["B0","T0"],"socket_contract":{"B0":{"edge":"bottom","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.16},"T0":{"edge":"top","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.035}}}
